displayName: ACG 角色心理/类脑数据库
summary: 这是跨作品角色与性格模型参考库，不是单一世界观。它汇集大量 ACG、游戏、漫画、动画、历史/模因及成人作品角色条目，并附带心理、人格、行为、外观与关系模板；另包含通用人格原型条目。
intendedUse: 作为 RP/写作时的人物心理与性格参考
作为人格原型与角色语气的参考库
notAWorldBecause: 角色来自多个互不相干作品与现实/模因来源
不存在统一地理、历史、国家或单一剧情线
同名/重复条目跨 2025年2月号、3月号与心理模型包出现
worldName: ACG 角色心理/类脑数据库
notes: Runtime gate: this slug is a reference library/personality index, not a single fictional world.
Do not auto-create shared canon relationships, locations, factions, or timeline among entries from different source works.
Adult/NSFW source material is excluded from curated runtime use; use only non-explicit names, source labels, and personality/archetype metadata.

allowedUse: non-explicit personality, voice, and archetype reference
inspiration for OC psychology only when an active campaign supplies its own continuity
forbiddenUse: do not merge characters from unrelated works into one shared canon continuity by default
do not infer shared geography, factions, timeline, or relationships across source works
do not use adult/NSFW source details as runtime content
runtimeUseGate.continuityRequirement: A caller must provide the active work/continuity; otherwise this slug is only a reference library, not a playable world.
